headline: Elon Musk Was Once Asked By OpenAI CEO Sam Altman: 'I Want To Be The Next Elon Musk. How Do I Do That?' — Here's What The Tesla Chief Said
summary: Sam Altman once asked Elon Musk how to become like him, and Musk shared that focusing on work with practical impact shaped his ventures, while their early collaboration on OpenAI eventually soured into a high-profile rivalry spanning AI and space.

headline: Mark Zuckerberg Names 'Facemash', Not 'Facebook', As His Most Significant Harvard Achievement
summary: Mark Zuckerberg has named Facemash, a prank website he developed during his Harvard days, as his most impactful creation, surpassing even Facebook.

headline: Nvidia's Jensen Huang Reveals He Helped Elon Musk Build Model S Computer, FSD Hardware
summary: Nvidia CEO praises collaborations with Tesla CEO Elon Musk and hails company's long-standing partnerships with automaker.

headline: META, NFLX, CRM, And More: 5 Stocks That Dominated Investor Buzz This Week
summary: Retail investors talked up five hot stocks this week (Dec. 1 to Dec. 5) on X and Reddit's r/WallStreetBets: META, CRM, PATH, NFLX, and TSLA.

headline: Buy Stock In MrBeast? Chamath Palihapitiya And Alexis Ohanian Already Did — And Retail Investors Might Be Next
summary: The company started by MrBeast behind his YouTube channel, Feastables and more could be heading to the stock market.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: CrowdStrike, MongoDB, SoFi — And Wall Street Surges On Rate Cut Hopes
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: NYSE Chief Says 2026 IPO Boom Is Coming After Market Shutdowns: 'It's Going To Be A Busy January...'
summary: New York Stock Exchange President Lynn Martin expects a surge of delayed IPOs to hit the market early next year after a series of disruptions pushed companies to pause their listing plans.

headline: Tim Cook's AI Reset Will Pay Off, Gene Munster Says— Predicts Apple's Top Mag 7 Performance
summary: On Friday, Deepwater Asset Management's Gene Munster says Apple Inc.'s (NASDAQ: AAPL) sweeping leadership shake-up is a strategic reset designed to strengthen its position in artificial intelligence — and he believes the company's stock will lead the Magnificent 7 through spring.

headline: Analyst Says Netflix-Warner Bros Merger Is About More Than Movies— It's An AI Play
summary: Netflix's $82.7 billion deal for Warner Bros. Discovery is a bet on AI and chips as much as movies and shows, according to a top analyst.

headline: Bernie Sanders Echoes Pope Leo's Warning On AI, Says Technology Must Serve The Common Good— Not Concentrate Wealth And Power In Big Tech
summary: Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.) echoed Pope Leo XIV's call for ethical artificial intelligence (AI) development on Friday.

headline: Netflix-Warner Bros $82.7 Billion Mega-Merger Sparks Fierce Hollywood, Lawmakers Backlash— Elizabeth Warren Calls It An 'Anti-Monopoly Nightmare'
summary: Netflix's $82.7 billion bid for Warner Bros. Discovery has ignited widespread alarm from politicians, unions and Hollywood insiders, who warn the merger could create a dominant streaming powerhouse that raises prices, cuts jobs and upends the entertainment industry.

headline: Trump Allies Voice Support As Elon Musk's X Slapped With $140 Million EU Fine— 'Impose Sanctions...'
summary: Trump allies have voiced their support after the European Union fined Elon Musk's social media firm X €120 million ($140 million) on Friday.
